hero.name: Fikri Firstly
hero.tagline: Turning raw data into meaningful decisions.
hero.subtagline: Specializing in NLP, Machine Learning, and Big Data Analytics.

about.p1: I'm Fikri Firstly Arrasyid Hawe, a Data Scientist with a passion for uncovering insights hidden in data. Currently pursuing a Master's in Computer Science at Universitas Gadjah Mada, I bring a unique blend of technical depth and analytical thinking to every project.
about.p2: My background spans Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Big Data Architecture, and IT Governance — giving me the ability to tackle problems from both a technical and strategic perspective. I completed the Full Stack Data Analytics program at RevoU, where I built end-to-end data solutions for real business challenges.
about.p3: When I'm not wrangling data, I enjoy music, movies, and reading.

contact.description: I'm open to data science roles, collaborations, and exciting projects. Feel free to reach out!
